narrative:
24Somerset (precinct in Perry County) has 917 registered voters, with 51.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.4 percentage points.
